notes: Pinned ratchet floors that must not regress. The contract_test_count metric is the static declaration count produced by scripts/audit.mjs::countTests (matches /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm across git-tracked tests/**/*.test.* files), not the vitest runtime total; the audit uses the static count so the ratchet is deterministic without shelling into vitest. Advancement is an explicit commit action; HEAD~1 moving-window comparison is insufficient (docs-only commits between regression and audit would hide the regression). Close gates depend on this file, not on HEAD~1 alone. See specs/plans/phase-1-close-revised.md §Slice 26b and ADR-0002 Addendum A. Initial floor 574 pinned post-Slice-26b (post-Codex-fold-in) HEAD static count — per Codex HIGH-1 fold-in on the Slice 26b diff, pinning below the post-slice count leaves the moving-window hole open (trivial revert of the new test file drops HEAD back to the floor and Check 19 stays green). Slice 33 (P2.2) adds tests/contracts/plugin-surface.test.ts (+26 static test declarations for plugin-command-closure enforcement per ADR-0007 CC#P2-3); floor advanced from 574 → 727 in the same Ratchet-Advance slice, closing the moving-window hole per Codex P2.2 MED 7 fold-in. Slice 34 (P2.3) adds tests/contracts/spine-coverage.test.ts (+13 static test declarations for ADR-0007 CC#P2-6 + EXPLORE-I1); floor advanced 727 → 740 in the same slice. Slice 35 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #1 — methodology upgrade) adds tests/contracts/artifact-backing-path-integrity.test.ts (+39 static test declarations for Check 25 backing-path integrity + Check 26 arc-close review presence gate, including stale-allowlist and unauthorized-container-sharer negative fixtures post Codex HIGH 2 / HIGH 3 fold-ins); floor advanced 740 → 779. Slice 37 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #3 — HIGH 2 widen event schema) adds tests/contracts/slice-37-dispatch-transcript.test.ts (+31 static test declarations: 26 initial binding the new dispatch.request / dispatch.receipt / dispatch.result variants to ADR-0007 §Amendment Slice 37 and the five-event durable dispatch transcript sequence, +5 Codex-fold-in tests covering MED #2 whitespace-only receipt_id rejection and MED #3 reducer-consumption round-trip via reduce() + RunProjection.safeParse); floor advanced 779 → 810 in the same Ratchet-Advance slice per Codex P2.2 MED 7 precedent. Slice 38 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #4 — HIGH 1 dispatch wiring + ADR-0008) adds tests/contracts/adapter-binding-coverage.test.ts (+18 static test declarations for Check 27 adapter-binding-coverage enforcement of ADR-0008 §Decision.1 explore dispatch policy and §Decision.3a dispatch result-to-artifact materialization rule; initial 15 declarations plus 3 post-Codex-HIGH-2/MED-2 fold-in declarations — required-step-id missing path, writes.artifact missing path, live fixture dispatch writes.artifact regression guard); WORKFLOW_KIND_DISPATCH_POLICY.explore requires synthesize-step + review-step to be dispatch-kind and every dispatch step to declare writes.artifact; floor advanced 810 → 828 in the same Ratchet-Advance slice per Codex P2.2 MED 7 precedent and Codex Slice-38 HIGH 3 fold-in. Slice 39 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #5 — HIGH 4 artifact-path split, option (b) distinct path) adds two Slice 39 regression guards to tests/contracts/artifact-backing-path-integrity.test.ts (+2 static test declarations: empty-allowlist post-resolution assertion + live-repo Check 25 green terminal-state assertion); the founding {explore.result, run.result} tracked-collision entry in ARTIFACT_BACKING_PATH_KNOWN_COLLISIONS was deleted since the underlying collision was resolved; checkArtifactBackingPathIntegrity gained an opts.knownCollisions override so the three tracked / stale-entry tests migrate off the deleted founding entry to a synthetic injected entry; floor advanced 828 → 830 in the same Ratchet-Advance slice per Codex P2.2 MED 7 precedent. Metadata fields (schema_version, last_advanced_at, last_advanced_in_slice) are audit-enforced via validatePinnedRatchetFloorData; floor zero or negative is rejected (Codex HIGH-2 fold-in). Future slices raise the floor only as an explicit ratchet-advance act.
